params.prompt: fine pixel art, 16-bit hi-bit style, point-and-click adventure game background, in the style of classic SCUMM adventures, painterly dithering, muted palette, moody theatrical night lighting, wide shot at street level, empty scene, no people, no animals, no text, no watermark.
